# Edwin Liby - Designer & Developer Portfolio

> Information, experience, projects, and contact details for Edwin Liby, a professional Designer & Developer specializing in high-performance web applications and sleek UI designs.

## Core Information
- **Motto**: Build with Clarity, Delivered with Speed
- **Experience**: ~3 years as a Designer and Developer
- **Primary Focus**: UI Engineering, Lead Frontend Development, SEO, Web Applications (React, Next.js, Framer Motion)
- **Contact Email**: [edwinliby2002@gmail.com](mailto:edwinliby2002@gmail.com)
- **Calendar/Scheduling**: [Book a Project Discussion via Cal.com](https://cal.com/edwin-liby/project-discuss)

## Professional Experience
- **Lead Frontend Engineer at Volshauz** (2023 - Present)
  - Led frontend engineering and UI design systems for modern digital platforms.
- **Frontend Developer Intern at MuLearn** (Jun 2023 - Jan 2024)
  - Worked on gamified learning platforms and community portals.
- **Freelance Developer & UI Engineer** (Feb 2022 - Present)
  - Designed and delivered websites for diverse industries (Real Estate, Dental Clinics, Educational institutions, Corporate clients).
- **Founder at Elvcom** (2021 - Present)
  - Founded and managed client project pipelines, delivering 5+ digital products.

## Featured Projects
- **MuLearn** (Learning Platform)
  - Tags: Development, UI Design
  - Description: An interactive, gamified education and skill-building community portal.
- **Project ScaleUp** (ScaleUp Conclave)
  - Tags: Web App, Next.js
  - Description: High-performance, fast-loading, state-of-the-art Next.js application for conferences and summits.

## Tech Stack & Skills
- **Frontend Frameworks**: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vanilla CSS, TypeScript
- **Design & Prototyping**: Figma, UI/UX Engineering, Design Systems
- **Motion & Interaction**: Framer Motion, Particles, Micro-animations, Scroll interactions
- **Specializations**: Responsive design, Performance optimization, SEO

Edwin has collaborated with 7+ major organizations and platforms:
